---
title: "Referrals"
description: "Referral information for case management and rehabilitation coordination across Northern Ireland."
---

# Referrals

We welcome enquiries from individuals, families, solicitors, insurers, healthcare professionals, and support providers.

::: {.highlight-box}
Our aim is to make the referral process clear, calm, and practical from the first conversation.
:::

## Who Can Refer?

- Solicitors
- Insurers
- Healthcare professionals
- Therapists
- Families
- Individuals seeking support

## What Happens Next?

::: {.service-card}
### 1. Initial Enquiry

We review the enquiry and identify whether case management support may be suitable.
:::

::: {.service-card}
### 2. Needs Discussion

We discuss current circumstances, priorities, risks, and support needs.
:::

::: {.service-card}
### 3. Assessment and Planning

Where appropriate, we arrange assessment and develop a clear support plan.
:::

::: {.service-card}
### 4. Ongoing Coordination

We liaise with relevant professionals and services to support practical progress.
:::

[Make an Enquiry](contact.qmd){.button-link}
